bonuses.leadin: Answer the following about Norman Foster, for 10 points each.
parts: Norman Foster used a triangular framing pattern in the design of a green New York skyscraper named for this scoundrel. His personal mansion, usually called his “Castle”, is located in California.
Foster designed this curved, domed London skyscraper at 30 St. Mary Axe.
Foster’s architectural firm also designed this gigantic pyramid-cum-opera house for the capital of Kazakhstan.
answers_sanitized: The Gherkin [or the Swiss Re Building]
the Palace of Peace and Reconciliation
